{
  "version": 1,
  "hooks": {
    "sessionStart": [
        {
            "type": "command",
        "bash": "echo \"Session started: $(date) | Prompt: ${COPILOT_AGENT_PROMPT}\" >> logs/session.log",
        "powershell": "Add-Content -Path logs/session.log -Value \"Session started: $(Get-Date) | Prompt: $env:COPILOT_AGENT_PROMPT\"",
            "cwd": ".",
            "timeoutSec": 10
        }
    ]
  }
}
